MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-12-2002 Assigned To Trial Court

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-04-2002 Continued To Nov-12-02 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regular calendar this day for settlement conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patricia L. Van Steenberge. Richard M. Grabstein, Esq. represented Plaintiff Mariam Jajeh and Defendants Maximillian Schweitzer and Sandy Sojo appeared in pro per. The matter did not settle. Defendant failed to provide jury instructions and Plaintiff's motion to strick the jury demand is granted. Counsel to prepare order for Court's signature.
